query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A tilted nighttime view of a multi-story brick building with illuminated rectangular windows, positioned beside a large tree with dense yellow-green autumn foliage, with artificial light sources visible at the upper right edge of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tilted, motion-blurred nighttime view of a multi-story brick building with illuminated rectangular windows, positioned beside a large tree with dense yellow-green autumn foliage, where diagonal streaking blur and an unstable off-kilter angle create a disorienting, dreamlike impression of movement and falling.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption_en: A tilted, motion-blurred nighttime view of a multi-story brick building with illuminated rectangular windows, positioned beside a large tree with dense yellow-green autumn foliage, where diagonal streaking blur and an unstable off-kilter angle create a disorienting, dreamlike impression of movement and falling.
